Table Rentals in Sussex NB

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Sussex NB is a Kings County's agricultural heartland and the Dairy Capital of Atlantic Canada, approximately 285 km from Bridgewater. We consider selected larger events in New Brunswick by availability and quote. Contact us with your event details and we will let you know whether your date and location work for our schedule.

Sussex NB is approximately 285 km from our Bridgewater base. New Brunswick bookings are for selected larger events only. Travel costs, accommodation requirements if applicable, availability, and all logistics are confirmed by quote before any commitment.

Gallery

Best For

  • Birthday parties
  • Community events
  • School and church gatherings
  • Outdoor events needing surface space

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you rent tables and chairs for events in Sussex NB?
Sussex NB is approximately 285 km from Bridgewater. Table and chair delivery to NB is for selected larger events by quote only.
How many chairs do you have available?
We currently have 15 black padded chairs in stock. White folding chairs are available by request from $3 each, and 6ft tables are available by request from $8 each. Quantities and availability are confirmed when you contact us.
What is the pricing for table and chair rentals?
Black padded chairs are $3 each (15 in stock). White folding chairs are available from $3 each by request. 6ft tables are available from $8 each by request. All pricing and availability are confirmed manually before booking.
Can I rent tables and chairs without renting an inflatable?
Tables and chairs are primarily offered as add-ons to inflatable rentals, foam parties, 360 Video Booth bookings, and party packages. Standalone table and chair rentals may be available by quote — contact us to discuss your needs.
How far in advance should I book tables and chairs?
We recommend contacting us as early as possible, especially for summer and weekend dates. Availability is not guaranteed until confirmed by us and a deposit is received. Do not assume availability based on online forms alone.
